mapper.sql: select electricity_id, user_id, user_name, user_room, read_month, last_reading, current_reading, used_amount, unit_price, total_fee, fee_status, due_date, payment_time, payment_no, overdue_amount, reader, read_time, create_time, update_time, remark, balance, surplus_electricity from community_electricity_fee
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
where fee_status = #{feeStatus} order by create_time desc
where read_month = #{readMonth} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into community_electricity_fee ( user_id, user_name, user_room, read_month, last_reading, current_reading, used_amount, unit_price, total_fee, fee_status, due_date, payment_time, payment_no, overdue_amount, reader, read_time, create_time, update_time, remark, balance, surplus_electricity ) values ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userRoom}, #{readMonth}, #{lastReading}, #{currentReading}, #{usedAmount}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalFee}, #{feeStatus}, #{dueDate}, #{paymentTime}, #{paymentNo}, #{overdueAmount}, #{reader}, #{readTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{balance}, #{surplusElectricity} )
mapper.delete:
delete from community_electricity_fee where electricity_id in
#{electricityId}
